calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Sep-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar today for Elder Adult Abuse OSC and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204. Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not reported.

Petitioner: Ignacio R. Castillo appeared with Counsel Judy Hitchcock, of Legal Assistance to the Elderly.

Respondent: Hildred LeBeau was not present.

Petitioner was sworn prior to the commencement of the hearing.

Ms. Hitchcock waived the reporter.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Petitioner's order is Granted as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 150 yards away from the protected person: Ignacio Castillo and his Residence (stay away is consistent with criminal protective order).

Respondent shall not Physically Abuse, Financially Abuse, Intimidate, Molest, Attack, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Follow, Stalk, Threaten, Harass, Destroy Personal Property, Keep under Surveillance, or Block Movements, Contact (directly or indirectly), Telephone, Send Messages, Mail or e-Mail, Take Any Action, Directly or Through Others, to Obtain the Addresses or Locations of the Protected Persons.

Respondent must move out immediately from and not return to: 450 Jones Street, #610, San Francisco, CA. 94102.

No Guns or Other Firearms/Turn In or Sell Guns or Firearms.

Expires September 13, 2013.

Order signed.

NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jul-21-2010 Off Calendar
